text:
Spear may refer to:
Spear of Longinus, the spear featured in the TV series, The End of Evangelion and Rebuild of Evangelion.
Mass production Spears of Longinus, the spears found in the first film series, wielded by the Mass Production Evangelions. 
Spear of Cassius, the spear featured in the Rebuild of Evangelion.
Spear of Lucretius, the spear featured in the Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA.
Spear of Gaius, the spear featured in the Rebuild of Evangelion.
Spear of Junctionus, the spear featured in the episode 21 of Shinkansen Henkei Robo Shinkalion Z.
